depth_pass: A2 Targeted Depth Block 1 — Item 21 Note Walk

revenue_recognition.assisted_tax_prep: Revenue recognized when completed return accepted by customer
revenue_recognition.royalties: Based on contractual percentages of franchise gross receipts, recorded when franchisee provides service
revenue_recognition.pom: Deferred and recognized over plan life (up to 6 years) based on historical claims pattern; majority claims in years 2-3
revenue_recognition.tis: Deferred and recognized as services provided through April 30 of following year
revenue_recognition.refund_transfer: Recognized when IRS acknowledgment received and bank account established
revenue_recognition.wave: Percentage of transaction amounts, recognized upon authorization

lease_structure.portfolio: Retail office space in US, Canada, Australia

goodwill_impairment.method: Qualitative assessment then quantitative (DCF + guideline public company)

income_tax_key.uncertain_tax_positions: Material — transfer pricing is critical audit matter

franchise_loan_portfolio.write_off_method: Territory revocation, loan write-off, refranchise or company-operate
